originalBehavior: The published route mounts a scatterplot with a fitted line and keeps the coefficient readout synchronized as sample points move.
localStatus: The local route keeps the original scatterplot, fitted line, draggable points, and coefficient panel from the published bundle with only shell-level cleanup around it.
notes: The published React runtime still owns point dragging, beta recomputation, and chart redraws.
Only page chrome, metadata, and local asset paths were patched for nested hosting.
evidence: The implementation plan treats the first-load scatter-plus-line scene and synchronized coefficient readout as parity-critical.
Shared smoke coverage verifies the chart mounts and that dragging a sample point changes the active line geometry and beta values.

originalBehavior: Readers can adjust a candidate regression line and compare the resulting squared-error geometry and loss value as the line changes.
localStatus: The local route keeps the original line controls, squared-error rendering, and loss-surface interactions without rewriting the published bundle.
notes: The candidate-line interaction still uses the published draggable regression controls and dial components.
The squared-error scene remains mounted by the original React components rather than a local recreation.
evidence: The implementation plan marks immediate line updates plus residual or loss synchronization as parity-critical.
Shared smoke coverage changes a regression control and verifies both the line geometry and error state update.

originalBehavior: The published explainer exposes beta or parameter panels plus additional OLS views, including a 3D loss-surface walkthrough tied to the same regression concepts.
localStatus: The local route keeps the original parameter panels and extended OLS walkthrough modules, including the loss-surface scenes driven by the published bundle.
notes: The page still ships the published secondary explanatory modules rather than flattening them into static prose.
The local copy vendors the shared EV runtime in the same relative path the page expects.
evidence: The implementation plan treats solve or reset behavior, objective readouts, and formula or coefficient panels as parity-critical where present.
Shared smoke coverage verifies the route stays runtime-stable while the OLS modules update.

originalBehavior: The published page included EV branding, author bylines, share widgets, newsletter prompts, analytics, comments, and root-relative asset references into the live Setosa tree.
localStatus: The local route removes those public-shell surfaces, uses the shared footer as the only live original-page reference surface, and resolves both the page bundle and shared EV runtime locally.
notes: Technical provenance remains in docs only.
The public page now loads the tutorial GIFs and shared EV runtime from local relative paths.
evidence: The public-surface audit blocks creator names, EV branding, share widgets, newsletter embeds, analytics, and comments from shipping pages.
The implementation plan treats the local handoff for both _bundle.js and common-shared.js as parity-critical.
